title: astragalus eigii
intro: Astragalus eigii, also known as Korean milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the pea family, known for its long, thin roots and clusters of small white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its adaptogenic properties, helping to balance the body's response to stress and promoting overall well-being. Astragalus eigii is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Astragalus eigii is often used as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
